sections.paragraph:
ἐνωρίστερον adv. of ἔνωρος (Phylarch: 81 Fgm. 44 Jac.) earlier, ahead of time AcPl Ha 3, 4.—DELG s.v. ὥρα.

adv. adv. = adverb, adverbially

Fgm. Fgm. = fragment, fragmentary

Jac. Jac. = Die Fragmente der griechischen Historiker, ed. FJacoby—Lists 5, 6

AcPl Ha AcPl Ha = Acts of Paul, PHamb—List 1

DELG DELG = PChantraine, Dictionnaire étymologique de la langue grecque—List 6

s.v. s.v. = sub voce (under the word, look up the word)

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 342
